So the killer in Scream 6 is Casey Becker's younger sister played by Samara Weaving who was only three months old when her sister was murdered. Her mum was institutionalized after the trauma of finding Casey and her dad killed himself shortly after so she ended up in Foster care and being abused most of her young adult life and her motive is good old fashioned revenge, with a twist and a bloody good one at that. It definitely has more of a Scream/Scream 2 vibe and there are plenty chase sequences one in particular with Gale in a newspaper printing facility at night done amazingly even better than her chase in Scream 2. Samara Weaving is absolutely fucking phenomenal in her role even more cold and psychotic than any killer seen before. Martha Meeks suffers a terrible death and it will definitely be quite disturbing for fans to watch. Lots of back story from 1 and 2 which ties each of the other films in as well in the killers final showdown. Ghostface is the only survivor at the end of Scream 6 as Gale is the final victim after two near kills in the movie and ghostface takes her phone and calls Sidney at the very end just before the credits role. She is watching tv with her husband and he goes to get them some wine when the phone rings. She answers to ghostface saying 'Family is everything, are the kids still sleeping'? She carries the phone and runs towards the stairs shouting her husband, when it pans to the kitchen floor behind the pantry door where he is lying dead with a corkscrew through his esophegus in a pool of blood. Like, from all of this trailer the only thing you found scary was a jumpscare, bruh, no fucking shit, scream doesen't equal scary.

This is something that really bothers me about horror movies, they make them to be seen by an incredibly stupid audience. This means that theses types of movies tell you exactly what is what, there is no mistery nor interpretation because it's already force fed to you, the human mind fears the unknown, and this entity can be switched with anything and it would make no diference, meaning that it is quite much known. 

Actual good horror is stuff like ARG's, mostly done by indie and it is 100% free and available on YT. Stuff like the Mandela Catalogue, Local 68, The Monument Mythos just to name a few. These are good horros that enphasize in the mistery of it, you don't know what is going on so you are scared, and you try to figure it out to reveal scarier layers to the narritive, THAT is true horror. 

Not to say every pro horror movie is bad, stuff like Mid Sommar or Heridatary are great movies, that also focuse on the mistery AND explore branches that are usually ignored like cults. In conclusion, fuck this lazy ass written shit this is no horror, it's just a dude putting a air horn in my ear.
